ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response is contextually relevant and maintains persona consistency, but could improve naturalness in phrasing to enhance overall quality.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>3<TAB>2<TAB>Short note: Lacks both context relevance and persona consistency; the response feels generic with minimal connection to Witch oracle characteristics or current situation, affecting overall quality.
The response maintains persona consistency and adds a touch of naturalness, but could improve context relevance by more directly addressing the player's request in light of current events.
